name: Tabbed Workspace
desc: Tabbed workspaces organize content into switchable tabs for efficient multi-tasking.

comparison_need.desc: How often users need side-by-side view

sequential_flow.desc: Whether items form an ordered sequence
sequential_flow.measure: ∃ ordering: items → ℕ where order matters

max_concurrent.desc: Max items user works with simultaneously

contraindications.mitigation: Consider tab groups or virtual tabs

comps.d: stores tab states (dirty, saved) by id

types.def: (id: TabID, title: String, content: Content, state: State, item: Item | null)
types.d: Tab with content, state, and optional item

types.def: (n_items: ℕ, item_independence: [0,1], state_weight: ℕ, switch_frequency: ℝ⁺, viewport_width: ℕ, comparison_need: [0,1], sequential_flow: 𝔹, max_concurrent: ℕ)
(applicable: 𝔹, score: [0,1], contraindications: List⟨Contraindication⟩, alternatives: List⟨(Pattern, score)⟩)
(id: String, condition: String, severity: String, action: String, reason: String, mitigation: String | null, alternative: Pattern | null)

ops.def: $evaluate(ctx) = let scores = {k: (eval(pred.def, ctx) ? pred.weight : 0) | (k, pred) ∈ predicates}; total = Σ(scores.values) / Σ(pred.weight | (k, pred) ∈ predicates); contras = [c | c ∈ contraindications, eval(c.condition, ctx)]; hard_fail = ∃c ∈ contras: c.severity = 'hard'; required_fail = ∃pred ∈ predicates: pred.required ∧ ¬eval(pred.def, ctx); applicable = ¬hard_fail ∧ ¬required_fail ∧ total ≥ threshold; alts = sorted([(a.pattern, eval_alt(a, ctx)) | a ∈ alternatives], by=score, desc); return (applicable, total, contras, alts)$

$create(title: String, content: Content) → Tab = tab := Tab(id=generate_id(), title, content, state=initial_state(), item=null); tabs[tab.id] := tab; buffers[tab.id] := content; state[tab.id] := tab.state; return tab$
$switch(tab_id: TabID) → Effect = if tab_id ∈ keys(tabs): save_state(active); active := tab_id; restore_state(tab_id); render(tabs[tab_id].content)$

$close(tab_id: TabID) → Effect = if unsaved_changes(tab_id): prompt_save(); tabs := remove(tabs, tab_id); buffers := remove(buffers, tab_id); state := remove(state, tab_id); if active = tab_id: active := adjacent_tab_id()$

$open(item: Item) → Effect = existing := find_tab_by_item(item); if existing ≠ null: active := existing.id; render(existing.content) else: tab := Tab(id=generate_id(), title=item.title, content=load(item), state=initial_state(), item=item); tabs[tab.id] := tab; buffers[tab.id] := tab.content; state[tab.id] := tab.state; active := tab.id$
